title: Unofficial MCCI Performance ModPack
description: The best unofficial MCC Island Modpack, delivering performance on MCCi similar to 1.8 minecraft!
body:
# The (Unnoficial) MCCI Performance Modpack
This Modpack was made beacuse MCC Island runs very badly on bad computers. This can help *a lot*, and can deliver performance close to 1.8 minecraft on MCC island. All the mods included are for performance purposes. This Modpack is NOT official.

# Features
Almost all of the mods in this ModPack are PURELY for performance purposes, except BactroMod, included because it is very useful for MCC Island's competitive and casual environment!
